note: Triggering eval. should_trigger=true means the file-issue skill should be consulted. Negatives are near-misses sharing keywords (issue/bug/github/ticket/track) that actually want a different skill or no skill.

evals.query: While I finish this migration, log a github issue that TestRunRepository.GetAllAsync does an N+1 — it loads evaluations one row at a time. It's in Trsr.Storage. Don't fix it, just track it.
can you open a ticket for that swallowed exception we saw in the cleanup service earlier? don't fix it now, just want it tracked
I'm updating the dashboard cost column. btw the manual page manual/guide/dashboard.md still documents a 'Cost per 1k' field we removed last sprint, so the docs are wrong now.
Adding the new evaluator. Noticed AgentCallRepository.RemoveOlderThanAsync catches Exception and logs nothing, so cleanup failures are silent. Not part of my task but someone should look at it.
make a github issue: the providers page e2e test in e2e/providers.spec.ts is flaky, times out roughly 1 in 5 runs
Refactoring the runner right now. There's duplicated retry logic copy-pasted across TheoryOptimizer, AbOptimizer and ProposalOptimizer. Out of scope for me today but it's real debt.
track this for later: the TODO in Validation.cs about the member-name bug is still there and it's now producing wrong error messages
Working on the licensing UI. Stumbled on a missing null guard in LicenseService.GetLimit — a malformed stored key throws instead of degrading to Free.
file an issue for the statistics backfill crashing on an empty DB because migrations haven't finished yet — SQLite 'no such table'. medium priority.
Fixing the language picker. Separately I see the settings page imports a deleted util formatCost that doesn't exist anymore — build's only green because it's tree-shaken out. Dead/broken code.
there's a bug in the function I just wrote — the token expiry check uses < instead of <=. fix it.
what open github issues do we have about the optimizer? list them for me
this e2e test is failing with 'expected empty database' — figure out why and get it green
let's add a new admin page that lists our open GitHub issues inside the app
cut a 1.3.0 release and tag it
go through our open issues and close the ones that are already fixed on master
this 600-line ProvidersPage component is a mess, split it up and clean it
commit these changes and open a PR against master
